description: Outcome-based persistent memory for AI coding tools (Claude Code, OpenCode)
release_notes: v0.5.5: Fix issue #8 — new memories stop being generated after GUI deletion of memory_bank entries. Root cause: ChromaDB's collection.delete() doesn't remove vectors from HNSW index, leaving phantom entries that match during dedup and block new fact storage. Fix replaces hard delete with soft delete (status=archived), adds archived filter to dedup queries, excludes archived from capacity count, and adds startup migration to clean pre-fix phantoms. Also ships: scoring mutex replaced with async request queue in OpenCode plugin (eliminates dropped scoring requests with slow localhost models), sidecar summary contamination fix via delimiter fencing in score_exchange prompt.
